mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBERS ( USER_ID, USER_PWD, PHONE, IS_RECEIVE_NOTIFICATION, ENROLL_DATE, POINTS, STATUS, USER_ROLE, CONSEC_DAYS, EXPERIENCE, USER_LEVEL ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userPwd}, #{phone}, #{isReceiveNotification}, SYSDATE, 10000000, 'Y', 'MEMBER', 0, 0, 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT M.USER_ID, M.USER_PWD, M.PHONE, M.POINTS, M.STATUS, M.USER_ROLE, M.ENROLL_DATE, M.CONSEC_DAYS, M.IS_RECEIVE_NOTIFICATION, M.EXPERIENCE, M.USER_LEVEL, M.BAN_LIMIT_DATE, T.TITLE_NAME AS equippedTitleName, T.TITLE_IMG_URL AS equippedTitleImgUrl, T.TITLE_COLOR AS equippedTitleColor FROM MEMBERS M LEFT JOIN MEMBER_TITLES MT ON M.USER_ID = MT.USER_ID AND MT.IS_EQUIPPED = 'Y' LEFT JOIN TITLES T ON MT.TITLE_ID = T.TITLE_ID WHERE M.USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RN, A.* FROM( SELECT USER_ID, PHONE, POINTS, ENROLL_DATE, BAN_LIMIT_DATE, STATUS, USER_ROLE FROM MEMBERS ORDER BY ENROLL_DATE DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM < = #{offset} + #{size} ) WHERE RN > #{offset}
